candidate_definitions.text: HaGeZi DNS: Free, Non-Commercial EU Public DNS Servers

HaGeZi DNS offers free, non-commercial public DNS resolvers designed and operated by a private individual for the European community. It provides robust DNS-based blocking of ads, trackers, scam, phishing, fake, and malware domains - helping users achieve greater privacy and sec…
